commands.name: crowdin-menu-bar
commands.title: Crowdin Menu Bar
commands.subtitle: Crowdin
commands.description: See your Crowdin projects at a glance

commands.name: upload-file
commands.title: Add File to Crowdin
commands.description: Upload a file to a Crowdin project

commands.name: build-project-translation
commands.title: Build Project Translation
commands.description: Build translations for a Crowdin project

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
